assertions.description: No crystal circuits detected - RP2350 uses a 12MHz crystal with 27pF load caps (C21/C22) visible in BOM
DVI connector (DVI1) present with 8 series resistors (R59-R66) for TMDS differential pairs but no DVI/HDMI interface detection
USB hub IC not detected (likely FE1.1s or similar given USB_HOST1-2 and USB_HOST3-4 connectors)
Audio amplifier IC not detected as subcircuit despite extensive audio signal path analysis
Power on/off switch circuit (PWR_ON/OFF1) with PWR_SW rail not analyzed as power management subcircuit
Line-In audio connector and headset connector not linked to audio signal path

REVIEW: Audio codec crystal circuit components (R91/R104 with C90/C93/C81/C91) classified as generic RC low-pass filters - these are actually crystal load network components for an audio codec crystal oscillator
REVIEW: Crystal feedback resistor R13 1k with 27pF caps classified as RC filter at 5.89MHz - this is crystal oscillator biasing, not an RC filter

REVIEW: AMP volume control network (R77 10k / R42 1k) classified as voltage divider but this is actually part of the digital volume control circuit for the audio amplifier where T2 is used as a variable attenuator
